opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: [Neighbor reports] He fell off the roof, and now he is gasping for air, clutching his chest, and his lips are completely blue!
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Extreme difficulty breathing, turning blue, and near-collapse following a high-impact fall from a ladder.

symptom_narrative.onset: 15 minutes ago, immediately after a 3-meter fall from a ladder onto his side
symptom_narrative.character: crushing, sharp right-sided chest pain, cannot inhale properly
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe — unable to speak in full sentences
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: gasping for air, lips turning blue, becoming confused and agitated, now slipping toward unconsciousness
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: none, first occurrence, follows a fall
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: lying on the ground, unable to stand, in extremis

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: fell from a ladder while doing roof/gutter work at home; neighbor present and providing history

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: neighbor extremely alarmed, wants immediate direction
